The '''Axum system''', also called the '''Anaxes system''', was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Azure sector/Legends|Azure sector]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. It contained two heavily populated [[Planet/Legends|planets]] of [[Axum]] and [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]] as well as three inhabited moons.<ref name="CatCW" />

{{System-stub}}
